name: HWR_AREA_OF_EXPERTISE
description: This table stores area of expertise information

columns.Name: PERSON_ID
columns.Comments: This is the person ID of the profile for which area of expertise info is stored

columns.Name: AREA_OF_EXPERTISE_CODE
columns.Comments: This columns stores the area of expertise code.

columns.Name: AREA_OF_EXPERTISE_ID
columns.Comments: This column stores the area of expertise.

columns.Name: EXPERTISE_ORDER
columns.Comments: This column stores the order of area of expertise.

columns.Name: AOE_ATTR_1
columns.Comments: AOE_ATTR_1: This is an extra column in case if needed

columns.Name: AOE_ATTR_2
columns.Comments: AOE_ATTR_2: This is an extra column in case if needed

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
